queries.question: What are the daily and transaction limits of clients with balance below 5000?
queries.sql: SELECT Daily_Limit, Transaction_Limit FROM Limits JOIN Accounts ON Accounts.AccountNumber  = Limits.AccountNumber WHERE Balance < 5000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?daily_limit ?transaction_limit WHERE {
  ?limits a :Limits .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?limits p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?limits p:Daily_Limit ?daily_limit .
  ?limits p:Transaction_Limit ?transaction_limit .
  ?accounts p:Balance ?balance_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?balance_f) < 5000)
}

queries.question: For all accounts, show the daily and transaction limits.
queries.sql: SELECT Accounts.AccountNumber , Limits.Daily_Limit, Transaction_Limit FROM Limits JOIN Accounts ON Accounts.AccountNumber  = Limits.AccountNumber
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?daily_limit ?transaction_limit WHERE {
  ?limits a :Limits .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?limits p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?limits p:Daily_Limit ?daily_limit .
  ?limits p:Transaction_Limit ?transaction_limit .
}

queries.question: How much money can clients with a balance below 5000 withdraw?
queries.sql: SELECT Transaction_Limit FROM Limits JOIN Accounts ON Accounts.AccountNumber  = Limits.AccountNumber WHERE Balance < 5000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?transaction_limit WHERE {
  ?limits a :Limits .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?limits p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?limits p:Transaction_Limit ?transaction_limit .
  ?accounts p:Balance ?balance_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?balance_f) < 5000)
}

queries.question: Show withdrawal limits by account
queries.sql: SELECT Accounts.AccountNumber , Limits.Daily_Limit FROM Limits JOIN Accounts ON Accounts.AccountNumber  = Limits.AccountNumber
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?daily_limit WHERE {
  ?limits a :Limits .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?limits p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?limits p:Daily_Limit ?daily_limit .
}
